ddls:
CREATE TABLE "polls" (
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each poll */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the poll */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the poll */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the poll */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the poll */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the poll */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the poll was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the poll was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the poll (e.g., active, inactive, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("poll_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_polls_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* ID of the poll the item belongs to */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the item */,
  "item_description" TEXT /* Description of the item */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the item was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the item was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_items_poll_id FOREIGN KEY ("poll_id") REFERENCES polls ("poll_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, moderator, user) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote */,
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* ID of the poll the vote belongs to */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item voted for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who cast the vote */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who cast the vote */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* Date and time the vote was cast */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the vote was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the vote was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_poll_id FOREIGN KEY ("poll_id") REFERENCES polls ("poll_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trail" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit entry */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., user login, poll creation, vote cast) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* ID of the poll affected by the activity (if applicable) */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item affected by the activity (if applicable) */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* Date and time the activity occurred */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_poll_id FOREIGN KEY ("poll_id") REFERENCES polls ("poll_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id", "permission_id")
)
